name: Danske Invest - Europa 2 KL
summary: Danske Invest - Europa 2 KL is an open-ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Danske Capital. It invests in the public equity markets of Europe. The fund was formerly known as Danske Invest - Europa Fokus. Danske Invest - Europa 2 KL was formed in July 3, 1998 and is domiciled in Denmark.
